title: Paracentral Acute Middle Maculopathy (PAMM) (3)
description: PAMM is an ischemic OCT finding caused by hypoperfusion of the intermediate and deep retinal capillary plexuses, and may occur with retinal vascular occlusions. On OCT it is characterised acutely by a placoid or band-like hyper-reflective lesion centered in the inner nuclear layer, sometimes with a prominent middle limiting membrane sign, followed by focal INL thinning.
